name: Frulli Frulla
lore:
Lore of Frulli Frulla
                                    


Frulli Frulla is an energetic, hummingbird-like being that appears as though it has emerged directly from a vibrant smoothie blender. As per the imaginative tales created by fans, Frulli was originally just a typical green hummingbird. However, its fate took a wild turn when it accidentally drank from a bowl of frullato—an Italian fruit smoothie—that had been carelessly abandoned by a quirky scientist.
Description original text
Original (Italian)
Frullì Frullà, un pinguino nel deserto che fa "blá blá blá". Con antenne sopra il dorso prende la tv. E la tazza di caffè gli fa un cenno così "Vieni qui mio caro amico bevi un po' con me", Ma il pinguino sorride; No fa caldo per il caffè. Continua a ballare con stile elegante nel deserto surreale scena delirante
English Translation
Frulli Frulla, a penguin in the desert that says "bla bla bla". With antennas on his back he takes the TV. And his coffee cup waves at him like "Come here dear friend, drink a little with me", And the penguin smiles; It's not hot for coffee. He continues to dance with elegant style in the surreal and delirious desert
Português
Frulli Frullá, um pinguim no deserto que faz "blá blá blá". Com uma antena nas costas ele usa a TV. E a xícara de café acena para ele tipo "Venha cá, caro amigo, beba um pouco comigo", E o pinguim sorri; Não é quente para um café. Ele continua a dançar com estilo elegante no deserto surreal e delirante.
